category_sources: Official tmt documentation says it manages tests and stores test metadata in git repositories.
source_facts.description says tmt is a Test Management Tool.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and repository use tmt.
docs_sources: Official Read the Docs site is the dedicated documentation surface and links the repository.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is titled teemtee/tmt: Test Management Tool.
Official tmt documentation links its Repository page to github.com/teemtee/tmt.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository identifies Python and shell implementation and testing-tool topics.
source_facts.description supports testing and test-management tags.
